title: EDiT code-project record
description: One record describes one code project in the EDiT ecosystem: an application, prototype, library, thesis codebase, or teaching repository. The catalog is an inclusive index, not a curated gate -- low-maturity work is welcome and the maturity field tells visitors what to expect.

id.description: Stable identifier, namespaced 'proj:' followed by a lowercase hyphenated slug.

description.description: Plain-language summary of what the project does and what it is for.

kind.description: What sort of code this is.

maturity.description: Honest maturity signal. 'concept'/'experimental' are explicitly welcome -- this is an index, not a quality gate. 'archived' = no longer maintained.

affiliation.description: e.g. KTH EPE, a course code, an R&D project

license.description: SPDX identifier for the code licence. Use LicenseRef-NONE for code published with no licence stated (all rights reserved by default -- flag this so users know they cannot reuse it freely), or LicenseRef-EXTERNAL for an unusual/proprietary licence described in notes.

repository.description: Primary source-code URL (e.g. a GitHub repo).

languages.description: Primary languages/stacks, e.g. Python, TypeScript, GridLAB-D.

consumesDatasets.description: Optional cross-links: ids of datasets in the EDiT data catalog that this project uses.

demoUrl.description: Optional live demo or docs URL.

notes.description: Licence caveats, status notes, how to run, etc.
